threat: Iran-linked hackers target IP cameras across Israel and Gulf
content:
#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 Emergency Hardening — Iran-linked hackers target IP cameras across Israel and Gulf
apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y 2>/dev/null || yum update -y 2>/dev/null
ufw enable 2>/dev/null; sed -i 's/PermitRootLogin yes/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
systemctl restart sshd 2>/dev/null
echo '[+] Hardening applied for: CDB-APEX-1772886630.json'
